title: 【代码】音乐播放器
content:
<!-- Insert to your webpage before the </head> -->
<script src="audioplayerengine/jquery.js"></script>
<script src="audioplayerengine/amazingaudioplayer.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="audioplayerengine/initaudioplayer-1.css">
<script src="audioplayerengine/initaudioplayer-1.js"></script>
<!-- End of head section HTML codes -->

<!-- Insert to your webpage where you want to display the audio player -->
<div id="amazingaudioplayer-1" style="display:block;position:relative;width:100%;max-width:24px;height:auto;margin:0px auto 0px;">
    <ul class="amazingaudioplayer-audios" style="display:none;">
        <li data-artist="" data-title="草予木 - 风花音乐欣赏5" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=1952292953.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="彼岸花 - 风花音乐欣赏4" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="https://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=1941639510.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="秋天不回来 - 风花音乐欣赏8" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=163123.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="如果爱忘了 - 风花音乐欣赏2" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=1933915376.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="面朝大海春暖花开-风花音乐欣赏1" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=29312951.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="天下有情人 - 风花音乐欣赏6" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=1496629559.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="终于等到你 - 风花音乐欣赏3" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">
            <div class="amazingaudioplayer-source" data-src="http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=481859184.mp3" data-type="audio/mpeg" />
        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="流浪记 - 风花音乐欣赏9" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">

        </li>
        <li data-artist="" data-title="灯火里的中国 - 风花音乐欣赏7" data-album="" data-info="" data-image="" data-duration="0">

</div>
